roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PAROLE PHC/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/3000ADM/X: DEFENDANT ADMITS VIOLATION #1 ATTEMPTED PC 459 (2ND DEGREE) ANDVIOLATION #3 FAILURE TO FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS,/3000REIN/PAJ:27 DAYS/X: WITH TIME LOST,/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 27 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE IN SAN FRANCISCO UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW  INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/X:PAROLEE IS ORDERED TO RETURN TO ORANGE COUNTY VIA BUS,/VD: HEARING DATE OF12-14-21/
